violations.description: Preventing contamination during storage. — --Food item was not properly protected from potential contamination. - Large bucket of partially peeled onions were uncovered in walk-in cooler. Near a leak coming from the ceiling of the walk-in.

Preventing contamination of packaged and unpackaged food. — --Food removed from original packaging was not placed in a container with an impervious and nonabsorbent cover. - Food that was not in original packaging found in grocery bags with red "Thank you" logos in walk-in freezer. Storing food removed from its original container or package need to be in a clean and sanitized covered container. Covers must be impervious and nonabsorbent.

Food-contact surfaces - Design and construction. — --Multiuse food-contact surfaces did not meet design and/or construction requirements. - Small bowl stored in container and used as scoop to dispense flour. In detached shed in back of building. Scoops need to have handles and handles stored out/away from food item it is stored with.

General equipment and utensils - Maintenance and operation. — --Food contact equipment/utensil was not maintained in good repair or sound condition. - Walk-in cooler has a leak in middle of ceiling and dripping on floor causing a hazard. Needs maintenance.
Cleaning frequency of equipment and utensils. — --Ventilation hood system was not cleaned properly and/or as frequently as required. - Buildup of grease on hood vents.

General premises. — --Opening to outside or portion of building that is not part of the food establishment, was not protected against the entry of insects and rodents. - Door to back shed, where some dry food and single used items are stored, wasn't pulled tightly closed all the way.
Clean/dry location, protected, covered, original containers, labeled (2 pts deducted)
Clean dry location, protected (1 pt deducted)
Clean, employee dressing area, cleaning equipment storage, living/sleeping quarters separate (1 pt deducted)
Proper storage, labeling, use (3 pts deducted)
Clean/dry location, protected, covered, original containers, labeled (2 pts deducted)
